vocab.meaning: khả năng cảm thụ thẩm mỹ
vocab.example: Frequent visits to art galleries have significantly refined my aesthetic sensibilities over the years.

vocab.meaning: sự diễn giải mang tính trừu tượng
vocab.example: I spent a long time in front of a modern piece, lost in my own abstract interpretation of the shapes.
The exhibition was fascinating as it displayed contemporaneous works from both European and Asian artists.
The gallery featured a vivid depiction of rural life in the 19th century that felt incredibly realistic.

vocab.meaning: sự nhất quán về chủ đề
vocab.example: What impressed me most about the collection was the thematic consistency across all the different rooms.

vocab.meaning: hình ảnh khơi gợi (cảm xúc mạnh)
vocab.example: The photographer's use of evocative imagery perfectly captured the somber mood of the post-war era.

vocab.meaning: tính liêm chính/nguyên bản trong nghệ thuật
vocab.example: Even in his later, more commercial years, the painter never sacrificed his artistic integrity for fame.

vocab.meaning: một cuộc triển lãm gợi nhiều suy ngẫm
vocab.example: I recently attended a thought-provoking exhibition about the impact of climate change on coastal communities.
The spatial arrangement of the sculptures allowed visitors to walk around each piece and see it from every angle.
National galleries play a crucial role in preserving the cultural heritage of a country for future generations.
